cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
title: Sherlock Holmes: The Awakened - Remastered Edition

notes: The game used to work with early Proton (~3.7-4) versions, ever since 3.7-6 it stopped. It does not work either with Wine 4.5-staging from distribution's repositories, broke somewhere around 4.2 and 4.3.
title: Sherlock Holmes: The Awakened - Remastered Edition

notes: Game will not launch at all.
title: Sherlock Holmes: The Awakened - Remastered Edition

notes: Follow up to my previous report where I said it was borked, on my primary system. The present is with my secondary system, an Asus gaming laptop with a GTX950. These three games (The Awakened, versus Jack the Ripper and Nemesis) require that you install PhysX MANUALLY, for some reason the preparation from Proton does not yield PhysX installed. You can either run the accompanying package in the Support/PhysX directory of the installation directory <Steamapps_PATH>/common/<SH_GAME>, download from nvidia the latest legacy package or install those from the versus Jack the Ripper version if you have them (found these to be the most reliable ones, by the way). To install an msi with proton, run in a terminal: WINEPREFIX=path_to/compatdata/11040/pfx <path_to/Proton\ 4.2/dist/bin/wine msiexec /i <path_to>/PhysX-######-SystemSoftware-Legacy.msi (if you download the .exe, no need to use msiexec!!)
title: Sherlock Holmes: The Awakened - Remastered Edition

notes: I have manually installed PhysX, as per previous report, and game worked well after that.
title: Sherlock Holmes: The Awakened - Remastered Edition
